Hey guys, welcome back to 10x launches. Now before we really dive in to the bulk of the course, I want to give you a very, very quick overview of what's inside, you know, and how we're going to approach this whole thing. The program is actually really split into two main parts. And part one is going to be very much foundational. You know, it's really the answer to the question, how do I write copy? How do I write copy for these launches, these funnels, these courses, these programs? How do I write copy? So it's really going to be about the approach. It's going to be the foundational shift of how you actually write messages that generate those OMG, you totally get me moments, you know, that earn trust and generate sales with your audience. And more importantly, it's going to be about how to do that quickly and reliably, you know, even if you're a copywriter and having to do this for audiences that you literally just met. It's going to be a methodical system for doing that. And yeah, it is going to be a bit of a process and require a bit of a paradigm shift. We are going to change the game and how you approach writing for your funnels. And this isn't going to be just a motivational brain. These are actually the practical mindsets and applications that really lay the foundation for your new quote unquote career as a conversion coach. So I invite you to steep in them, watch them twice if you have to. The content is really going to be new, but it will be what empowers you to make writing copy your favorite part about launching courses and especially writing for your funnels. So whereas module one will be, you know, mostly conceptual and theory about the coaching, the conversion method, module two, the ever evolving avatar is where you'll actually get a really big picture at what's at play here. You know, if the whole process of coaching the conversion is about taking our customer on this journey and really coaching that transformation, we're going to really have to get to know who they are, you know, and respect them as this growing three dimensional, ever evolving thing, this entity, this avatar. So this is going to be the module where we really breathe life into them. You're going to get a taste of the 47 golden questions workbook, which is actually going to be our reference manual for everything coming later in the course. These are really going to be the questions that drive the content. They're really going to be the things that get us to view our avatar in a new, very real way, you know, in a way that will allow us to build rapid trust and intimacy. So that's what's going to be in store with module two. Following that, we're going to get into the second part of the course, which is going to be modules three through seven, where we're actually going to take a much deeper dive into the five core subsequences of every launch. So regardless of what kind of funnel or methodology or system you are using, you will inevitably be leveraging and really using these five different phases, you know, and each one has very specific beats that you're going to have to be hitting if you're going to want to coach the conversion. So we're going to talk about all of these individually. We're going to talk about what function they play in the overall conversion and how you, as a conversion coach, need to approach them in order to really make sure they're doing their job. And then finally, for each module, for each subsequence, you are going to be introduced to something I call theme plates. You know, you're going to get a library. There's going to be about 20 to 25 of them within the course. We're going to be updating these throughout. But these are, you know, things I've initially created for myself, you know, to know what my go to theme plates would be in each scenario. You know, OK, I need to coach decisiveness, for example. Here is a theme plate that I could use to effectively do that. So you're going to be introduced to theme plates in each module that are appropriate for that particular subsequence. Why I call them theme plates and not templates is because there really is no such thing as swipe and deploy. There is no one size fits all thing. So while these theme plates really do give a great compass and indication, even a structure to follow to really get these emails done, I really do want to give that disclaimer right off the bat. And I'm going to remind you throughout that there is no such thing as one size fits all. Really, these are designed not because they are worded in any kind of particularly brilliant way, but the structuring of them, the layering of them and what content, you know, what messages you're able to kind of really use these theme plates for as a container for is really going to be, you know, why they get the results. So that's a word on theme plates. That is really it. That is really the core of the course. We have our foundational elements. We're going to do a deeper dive into all the phases of your launch. And for each one, you are going to get the theme plates so that you can really just plug them in and know what to write at what time. You know, and that's what takes out most of the anxiety around writing high converting email copies. So that's what is in store. I will meet you in one final little lesson within the welcome module where I am going to talk about a few different ways to approach this course to really maximize your ROI. So take a little break and meet me there in a minute.
